title: WASHINGTON COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER WASHINGTON COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for people experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises. Staffed with master's-level clinicians who are trained to provide telephone crisis counseling. Also offers referrals for follow-up routine treatment for ongoing support and services, even if the caller is not eligible for county-funded services. If a crisis cannot be resolved over the phone, the crisis line may direct the caller to a local emergency room or dispatch the Washington County Mobile Crisis Team to come to the caller. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 291-9111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (503) 291-9111 Crisis INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Hawthorn Farm TriMet MAX stop Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WRAPAROUND CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING ADDICTION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CENTER FOR ADDICTIONS TRIAGE AND TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MENTAL HEALTH REFERRALS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER
